title: SOL 2pk 20m All Purpose Rope – Durable Multipurpose Cord for Camping, DIY, Garden, Laundry Line, Outdoor Use & General Tying Tasks – Strong Poly Rope for Home & Travel Utility
features: Heavy Duty Performance: This heavy duty rope is built to handle rigorous tasks with ease, offering outstanding strength for lifting, pulling, and securing loads.
Unmatched Strength and Reliability: As a strong rope, it ensures dependable performance under pressure, making it ideal for both professional and everyday use.
Tightly Braided for Extra Durability: Designed as a braided rope, its tight weave reduces fraying and enhances lifespan, even when subjected to constant abrasion.
Ideal for Outdoor Use: This outdoor rope resists moisture, and temperature shifts, making it perfect for camping, sailing, gardening, and more.

Multi-Purpose and Easy to Handle: Among the most versatile ropes available, its 20-metre length and flexible design make it suitable for a wide variety of indoor and outdoor tasks. You'll receive 2x ropes in random colours!
description: Product Description Previous page Next page Shop Our Product Range Rope 20m Add To Basket Bungee Cord w/ Carabiner Add To Basket 4pk 75cm Long Bungee Cord Add To Basket 12 Bungee Cord with Balls Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.5 out of 5 stars 2 4.1 out of 5 stars 66 3.7 out of 5 stars 154 4.6 out of 5 stars 75 Price £6.49 £ 6 . 49 £4.99 £ 4 . 99 £4.99 £ 4 . 99 £6.99 £ 6 . 99 Flexible and Easy to Use ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Ergonomic Handling ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Multiple Applications ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Easy Storage ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ All-Weather Performance ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ What is this 20m rope best used for? This 20m strong poly rope is ideal for camping, gardening, DIY, securing laundry, tying tarpaulins, or general outdoor and travel use. Is this rope suitable for outdoor weather conditions? Yes, this outdoor rope resists moisture and temperature changes, making it reliable for long-term outdoor exposure in the UK climate. Can this rope handle heavy-duty tying tasks? Absolutely. As a heavy duty rope with a tightly braided rope design, it offers excellent strength for lifting, pulling, and securing. Does the rope hold knots securely? Yes, this rope for knot tying practice is both flexible and strong, making it perfect for forming and holding reliable knots during repeated use. Are multiple colours available for easy use or sorting? Yes, this multipurpose cord comes in red, green, and blue rope options, great for colour-coding or matching specific setup requirements.
